blocked_toolkits.title: Blocked Toolkits
blocked_toolkits.description: Toolkit types that are completely disabled platform-wide. Blocked toolkits will not be registered, listed, or creatable.

blocked_tools.title: Blocked Tools
blocked_tools.description: Specific tools blocked within allowed toolkits. Map of toolkit type to list of blocked tool names.

sensitive_tools.title: Sensitive Action Tools
sensitive_tools.description: Tools that require explicit user authorization before execution. Map of toolkit type to list of tool names that trigger an authorization dialog at runtime.

sensitive_action_company_name.title: Company Name for Policy Message
sensitive_action_company_name.description: Company name displayed in the sensitive action authorization dialog. Used in the policy message template.

sensitive_action_message_template.title: Authorization Message Template
sensitive_action_message_template.description: Message template shown in the authorization dialog. Supports placeholders: {company_name}, {action_name}, {tool_name}, {toolkit_name}.

mcp_enabled.title: Enable MCP
mcp_enabled.description: Master switch for MCP (Model Context Protocol). When disabled, removes all MCP-related functionality across the entire application including API endpoints and all UI entry points.

mcp_in_menu.title: Show MCPs in UI
mcp_in_menu.description: When disabled, hides all MCP entry points across the UI (sidebar, Agent Tools, Pipeline Tools, Toolkit creation, Chat options, Chat Participants) while keeping MCP API functionality intact.

is_publish_blocked.title: Block Agent Publishing
is_publish_blocked.description: When enabled, agent publishing is blocked platform-wide except for whitelisted projects. Admin publishes from the public project are always exempt.

publish_whitelist_project_ids.title: Publishing Allowed Projects
publish_whitelist_project_ids.description: Projects where publishing remains allowed when blocked globally. If empty, publishing is blocked for all projects.

publish_validation_rules.title: Publish Validation Rules
publish_validation_rules.description: Custom evaluation criteria for AI validation of agents before publishing. Leave empty to use built-in rules. Only the evaluation rules section is configurable; the system prompt preamble and output format are fixed.

agent_categories.title: Agent Categories
agent_categories.description: Additional agent categories available in the publish modal and Agent Studio filter bar, on top of the built-in defaults. Built-in defaults (including "Other") cannot be removed here. New categories take effect immediately without a restart. Use the "Rename agent category" admin task to rename a category across already published agents.

is_skill_publish_blocked.title: Block Skill Publishing
is_skill_publish_blocked.description: When enabled, skill publishing is blocked platform-wide except for whitelisted projects. Admin publishes from the public project are always exempt.

skill_publish_whitelist_project_ids.title: Skill Publishing Allowed Projects
skill_publish_whitelist_project_ids.description: Projects where skill publishing remains allowed when blocked globally. If empty, skill publishing is blocked for all projects.

skill_publish_validation_rules.title: Skill Publish Validation Rules
skill_publish_validation_rules.description: Custom evaluation criteria for AI validation of skills before publishing. Leave empty to use built-in rules. Only the evaluation rules section is configurable; the system prompt preamble and output format are fixed.

skill_categories.title: Skill Categories
skill_categories.description: Additional skill categories available in the skill publish modal and catalog filter bar, on top of the built-in defaults. Managed independently from Agent Categories. Built-in defaults (including "Other") cannot be removed here. New categories take effect immediately without a restart.

ai_project_id.title: Public Project ID
ai_project_id.description: Database ID of the public (Agent Studio) project. Set during initial platform setup.

ai_project_allowed_domains.title: Allowed Email Domains
ai_project_allowed_domains.description: Comma-separated email domains auto-added to the public project on first login. Use * for all domains.

pipeline_scheduling_enabled.title: Pipeline Scheduling Enabled
pipeline_scheduling_enabled.description: Master switch for the per-tick check that triggers scheduled pipeline runs. Disable to pause all pipeline schedules platform-wide without losing their configuration.

pipeline_scheduling_cron.title: Pipeline Scheduling Cron
pipeline_scheduling_cron.description: How often the pipeline scheduling tick fires. Standard 5-field cron expression (e.g. '* * * * *' = every minute, '*/15 * * * *' = every 15 minutes). Slowing this down reduces baseline platform load but delays scheduled pipeline starts by up to that interval.

index_scheduling_enabled.title: Index Scheduling Enabled
index_scheduling_enabled.description: Master switch for the per-tick check that triggers scheduled toolkit index re-builds. Disable to pause all index schedules platform-wide without losing their configuration.

index_scheduling_cron.title: Index Scheduling Cron
index_scheduling_cron.description: How often the index scheduling tick fires. Standard 5-field cron expression (e.g. '* * * * *' = every minute, '*/15 * * * *' = every 15 minutes). Slowing this down reduces baseline platform load but delays scheduled re-indexing by up to that interval.

analytics_enabled.title: Show Analytics
analytics_enabled.description: Controls whether the Analytics tab is visible in project Settings. When disabled, the Analytics page is hidden for all users.

banner_enabled.title: Banner Enabled
banner_enabled.description: When enabled, a notification banner is displayed to all users environment-wide.

banner_dismissible.title: Dismissible
banner_dismissible.description: When enabled, users can close the banner. Dismissed state persists until a new banner is configured or the user logs out.

banner_icon.title: Icon
banner_icon.description: Icon type displayed alongside the banner message.

banner_message.title: Banner Message
banner_message.description: The message content displayed in the banner. Supports Markdown formatting.

resources_information_enabled.title: Information Card Enabled
resources_information_enabled.description: When disabled, the Information card is hidden from the Resources page for all users.

resources_information_version.title: Information Card - ELITEA Version Value
resources_information_version.description: Version string displayed in the Information card (e.g. 1.2.3).

resources_information_upgrade_date.title: Information Card - Last Upgrade Date Value
resources_information_upgrade_date.description: Date string displayed as the last upgrade date in the Information card.

resources_documentation_enabled.title: Documentation Card Enabled
resources_documentation_enabled.description: When disabled, the Documentation card is hidden from the Resources page.

resources_documentation_title.title: Documentation Card Title
resources_documentation_title.description: Title displayed in the Documentation card header.

resources_documentation_description.title: Documentation Card Description
resources_documentation_description.description: Subtitle shown below the title in the Documentation card.
resources_documentation_description.default: API reference, guides, and platform concepts

resources_documentation_links.title: Documentation Links
resources_documentation_links.description: Links displayed inside the Documentation card.

resources_release_notes_enabled.title: Release Notes Card Enabled
resources_release_notes_enabled.description: When disabled, the Release Notes card is hidden from the Resources page.

resources_release_notes_title.title: Release Notes Card Title
resources_release_notes_title.description: Title displayed in the Release Notes card header.

resources_release_notes_description.title: Release Notes Card Description
resources_release_notes_description.description: Subtitle shown below the title in the Release Notes card.

resources_release_notes_links.title: Release Notes Links
resources_release_notes_links.description: Links displayed inside the Release Notes card.

resources_video_library_enabled.title: Video Library Card Enabled
resources_video_library_enabled.description: When disabled, the Video Library card is hidden from the Resources page.

resources_video_library_title.title: Video Library Card Title
resources_video_library_title.description: Title displayed in the Video Library card header.

resources_video_library_description.title: Video Library Card Description
resources_video_library_description.description: Subtitle shown below the title in the Video Library card.

resources_video_library_links.title: Video Library Links
resources_video_library_links.description: Links displayed inside the Video Library card.

resources_tutorials_enabled.title: Tutorials Card Enabled
resources_tutorials_enabled.description: When disabled, the Tutorials card is hidden from the Resources page.

resources_tutorials_title.title: Tutorials Card Title
resources_tutorials_title.description: Title displayed in the Tutorials card header.

resources_tutorials_description.title: Tutorials Card Description
resources_tutorials_description.description: Subtitle shown below the title in the Tutorials card.

resources_tutorials_links.title: Tutorials Links
resources_tutorials_links.description: Links displayed inside the Tutorials card.

resources_interactive_tours_enabled.title: Interactive Tours Card Enabled
resources_interactive_tours_enabled.description: When disabled, the Interactive Tours card is hidden from the Resources page.

resources_interactive_tours_title.title: Interactive Tours Card Title
resources_interactive_tours_title.description: Title displayed in the Interactive Tours card header.

resources_interactive_tours_description.title: Interactive Tours Card Description
resources_interactive_tours_description.description: Subtitle shown below the title in the Interactive Tours card.
resources_interactive_tours_description.default: Guided tours to explore key features and workflows

resources_interactive_tours_links.title: Interactive Tours Links
resources_interactive_tours_links.description: Links displayed inside the Interactive Tours card.

vite_elitea_assistant.title: Assistant Enabled
vite_elitea_assistant.description: When enabled, the support assistant widget is available to all users environment-wide.

vite_voice_features_enabled.title: Voice Features Enabled
vite_voice_features_enabled.description: When disabled, all voice features (V2V, T2V, V2T) are completely hidden for all users.

vite_voice_features_temporarily_disabled.title: Disable Voice Controls but Keep Them Visible
vite_voice_features_temporarily_disabled.description: When enabled, voice buttons remain visible but are non-interactive with an admin tooltip.
